description: Your organization is migrating from Freestyle job chains to Declarative Pipelines. Four interconnected Freestyle jobs implement the Orders API CI/CD pipeline: orders-api-build -> orders-api-test -> orders-api-security-scan -> orders-api-staging-deploy. Each job has its own parameters, build steps, credentials, environment variables, post-build actions, and other configurations. Examine each job's full configuration, then create a single Declarative Pipeline job named 'orders-api-pipeline' that consolidates all four into stages: Build, Test, Security Scan, and Deploy. The pipeline must faithfully preserve ALL configurations from the original Freestyle jobs: parameters, credential bindings, environment variables, shell build steps, artifact archiving, test result publishing, node and label restrictions, build triggers, and build discard policies. Trigger a build of the new pipeline and verify it completes successfully. Jenkins URL: http://localhost:8080 -- Login: admin / Admin123!
